name: Your Pretty Face Is Going to Hell
original_name: Your Pretty Face Is Going to Hell
overview: A live-action workplace comedy about Gary, an associate demon, as he attempts to capture souls on earth in order to climb the corporate ladder of the underworld. Gary hopes to advance in Hell, but he may be too stupid, lazy and kind-hearted to realize his dreams of promotion. Meanwhile, Gary's intern Claude is more talented, more devious and will do whatever it takes to impress Satan.

trailers.title: Your Pretty Face Is Going To Hell preview
